← The Foundations

The Foundations · Keep the books

Bookkeeping II — Prep for your bookkeeper

Learn what a clean handoff looks like so your bookkeeper thanks you, instead of billing you to untangle a shoebox.

90 minutes · live, small group

What we'll cover

  • What a clean handoff to a bookkeeper looks like
  • The documents and access to organize ahead of time
  • How to avoid getting billed to untangle a mess

What you'll walk out with

A handoff checklist your bookkeeper will love.

Know before you go

Bookkeeping I, or an existing bookkeeping setup.

The Foundations open this fall (2026). Be first to hear — and grab a free hour in the meantime — at Coffee with Quinta.
